title: Emily is Away <3
description:
It's 2008 and AIM is Dead.Better sign up for this Facenook thing everyone's talking about.Explore Facenook
Wall posts, tagged photos and poke wars. Craft your online persona through nostalgia inducing gameplay.Chat with friends.
Everything your character says is up to you. Build up your relationships up, or burn your friend group to the ground.Choose your path.
Emily <3 features multiple branching paths, unique conversations and different endings. All of them depending on the choices you make.
description_short: Emily <3 is a brand new story set on an old-new social media. Customize your facenook profile, send some friend requests and determine the outcome of your senior year.
